allow: Bash(node -e "const b = require\('@ethersphere/bee-js'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(b\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('signer'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('feed'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('stamp'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('null'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('private'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const b = require\('@ethersphere/bee-js'\); const bee = new b.Bee\('https://bzz.limo'\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(bee\)\).filter\(k => k.includes\('eed'\) || k.includes\('opic'\) || k.includes\('ign'\) || k.includes\('pload'\) || k.includes\('ownload'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const bee = require\('@ethersphere/bee-js'\); const b = new bee.Bee\('https://bzz.limo'\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(b\)\).filter\(m => m.includes\('anifest'\) || m.includes\('ollection'\) || m.includes\('irectory'\) || m.includes\('iles'\) || m.includes\('bzz'\) || m.includes\('File'\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(p.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('devDeps:', list\(p.get\('devDependencies',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
